meta.description: High-intent pairing guide taxonomy enrichment config.

wine-with-steak.whyIntro: Steak is high in protein and fat, requiring structured wines with tannin. Tannins bind to meat proteins, reducing astringency and enhancing flavor perception.

wine-with-chicken.whyIntro: Chicken spans lean breast to rich dark meat — moderate tannin and bright acidity keep the match balanced without overpowering.

wine-with-salmon.whyIntro: Salmon's fat and richness need either a light red with soft tannin or a structured white with acidity to refresh the palate.

wine-for-bbq-ribs.whyIntro: BBQ ribs combine smoke, sweetness, and fat — bold reds with tannin and concentrated fruit stand up to the sauce without thinning.

wine-for-thanksgiving-turkey.whyIntro: Thanksgiving spreads mix lean turkey, rich sides, and sweet elements — versatile reds with moderate structure bridge the table.
